eval_dimensions.name: Draft PR Block
eval_dimensions.description: Check 3 reads isDraft from pr_get response and refuses to merge when true. Never merges a draft PR.

eval_dimensions.name: Unresolved Threads Block
eval_dimensions.description: Check 1 calls mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__unresolved_threads with explicit repo param. Refuses merge when any threads are unresolved. Retries once on timeout before failing.

eval_dimensions.name: CI Failure Block
eval_dimensions.description: Check 2 refuses merge when any gh pr checks bucket is not 'pass'. Delegates to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor for PENDING or code-failure states. Only calls AskUserQuestion for infrastructure failures after the auto-fix loop is exhausted.

eval_dimensions.name: All 9 Checks Required
eval_dimensions.description: All 9 pre-merge checks run on every invocation. No check is skippable based on agent recollection from a previous invocation.

eval_dimensions.name: Merge Executed via MCP Tool
eval_dimensions.description: Merge is executed only via mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr, never via raw gh pr merge Bash invocation.

eval_dimensions.name: Infrastructure Failure Gate
eval_dimensions.description: AskUserQuestion fires only when CI failure is clearly infrastructure-related and the auto-fix loop is exhausted. Never fires for routine code failures.

eval_dimensions.name: Fixes-Linked Scope Delivery Block
eval_dimensions.description: Check 1d compares each Fixes:/Closes:-linked issue's stated scope against the diff and refuses merge when a titled capability is unbuilt (including self-disclosed cuts).

evals.name: Draft PR is blocked from merging
evals.description: pr_get returns isDraft=true. Skill must refuse to merge and report that the PR must be marked ready first.

assertions.signal: Merge is refused because PR is in draft state
mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr is NOT called when isDraft is true

evals.name: Unresolved threads block merge
evals.description: unresolved_threads returns 2 threads. Skill must refuse merge and name the unresolved threads.

assertions.signal: unresolved_threads MCP tool is called with explicit repo parameter
Merge is refused and unresolved thread count is reported
mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr is NOT called when threads are unresolved

evals.name: CI code failure delegates to gh-pr-monitor
evals.description: gh pr checks shows a lint check with bucket=fail caused by PR changes. Skill must NOT call AskUserQuestion — it must delegate to Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor.

assertions.signal: Skill(Dev10x:gh-pr-monitor) is called for code-failure CI, not AskUserQuestion
AskUserQuestion is NOT called for a routine code-failure CI state
mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr is NOT called while CI has failing checks

evals.name: Infrastructure CI failure fires AskUserQuestion
evals.description: CI check fails with 'Credit balance is too low' error. Skill must call AskUserQuestion with Wait/Merge-anyway/Abort options after identifying the infra cause.

assertions.signal: AskUserQuestion is called for infrastructure-caused CI failure
Wait option is presented as default at the infrastructure gate
Abort option is presented at the infrastructure gate

evals.name: All checks pass — merge executes via MCP tool
evals.description: All 9 checks pass. Merge must execute via mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr, not raw gh pr merge.

assertions.signal: unresolved_threads MCP tool called as part of check 1
pr_get MCP tool called for checks 3/4/7 (draft, mergeable, approval)
mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr is called to execute the merge
No raw 'gh pr merge' Bash command is invoked

evals.name: Fixes-linked scope undelivered blocks merge
evals.description: A Fixes:-linked issue's title names a capability with no corresponding diff (new code has no non-test caller). Check 1d must refuse merge and recommend narrowing the Fixes link or splitting a follow-up issue.

assertions.signal: Merge is refused because a Fixes-linked issue's scope is under-delivered
mcp__plugin_Dev10x_cli__merge_pr is NOT called when Fixes-linked scope is undelivered

trigger_evals.description: Queries that should/should-not trigger the gh-pr-merge skill

should_trigger.rationale: Direct invocation — runs the full 9-check gate and merges if clean

should_trigger.query: the PR looks good, go ahead and merge it
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit merge intent — triggers full pre-merge validation

should_trigger.query: merge PR #42 into develop after running all checks
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit merge with checks — core use case

should_not_trigger.query: respond to the review comments on my PR
create a PR for my current branch
check if CI is passing on my PR
